case_title: ROSYLAND BAUER VS. LASALLE HOTEL PROPERTIES

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED AND FILED BY DEFENDANT LASALLE HOTEL PROPERTIES DBA HOTEL MONACO GRAND CAFE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LASALLE HOTEL PROPERTIES DBA HOTEL MONACO GRAND CAFE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. "THIS CLAIM WAS FILED BEYOND THE 2 YEAR STATUTORY PERIOD AND WAS PREVIOUSLY ADJUDICATED IN SMALL CLAIMS ON NOVEMBER 8, 2013 CSM-13--845051. CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY RENEE CROW--AGENT FOR DEFENDANT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
